android.widget.TextView.text: Trump Knew the Risk of Iran Blocking the Strait of Hormuz. He Still Went to War.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: The president told his White House team that Tehran would likely capitulate before closing the strait, the world’s most vital shipping lane.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: U.S. Bombs Iran’s Oil Export Hub, Raising Pressure Over Strait
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: The Pentagon is moving a Marine expeditionary unit to the gulf. Five U.S. Air Force refueling planes were struck at a U.S. air base in Saudi Arabia.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.view.View.content-desc: Kharg Island EUROPEAN SPACE AGENCY/AFP/Getty Images Abbassiyeh, Lebanon Kawnat Haju/AFP/Getty Images Tehran Majid Saeedi/Getty Images Beirut AFP/Getty Images Herat, Afghanistan EPA/Shutterstock Tampa, Fla. Dave Decker/ZUMA Press Holon, Israel Erik Marmor/Getty Images Fairford, Gloucestershire, UK Phil Noble/Reuters Tehran, Iran AFP/Getty Images Northern Israel Odd Andersen/AFP/Getty Images
android.view.View.heading: false
